description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build with CMake that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a Windows job matrix with three configurations: with Qt and examples, without Qt but with examples, and without examples or Qt. For each job, check out the repository, enable the Developer Command Prompt, optionally install Qt 6.6.0, configure CMake with Release build type and example/Qt options based on matrix parameters, and then build the project using Ninja.
